raw_cv_text:
Kim Junior
: mazenabosalem95@gmail.com LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/mabosalem
Education
2022-present University of Sheffield – MEng Mechatronics and Robotics
• Achieved 2.1 in my second year (Upper second class)
• Relevant coursework: Introduction to Electric and Electronic Circuits, Modelling
Analysis and Control, Physical Systems, Intelligent Systems, Predictive Maintenance for
a CP Lab Factory.
• Volunteering:
• Inclusion officer at the Egyptian Society in Sheffield
2021-2022 University of Sheffield – Foundation degree in Science and Engineering
• Graduated with 78%
2019-2022 Mansoura College (Egypt)
• A-Levels:
o Physics A, Mathematics A (P1, P2, P3, Mechanics)
• IGCSEs:
o Math A*, Physics A*, Biology A*, Chemistry A*, English A*, Accounting A*,
Economics A*, ICT A*
Working Experience
2024 SURE Scheme – University of Sheffield
• 6 weeks internship with the goal of developing a replica of a gas measuring device used in
anaerobic lab applications
• Created a STL file of one part of the device, chose the right electronic components
according to the device’s purpose and the university budget.
• Utilized Microsoft Excel to interpret and analyze data collected from an Arduino
• Result is the replica is partially created; I didn’t have enough time to finish it. Documented
my progress for next year’s students.
2024 International Student Ambassador – University of Sheffield
• Part time job
• Delivered a presentation about Mechatronics and Robotics at the University of Sheffield to
prospective students and parents
• Led campus tours and engaged with visitors during open days
2023 Academic Mentor – University of Sheffield
• Full time volunteering job
• Mentored the students through giving advice on how to approach their modules, sending
them my modules notes, telling them what to prioritize now and what to leave for later.
• One student was very active, and he has grown both academically and personally (still
mentoring him till now)
Technical Experience from University Projects & Competitions
2026 Tactile Sensation Prediction
• Final year dissertation project (Still in progress)
• Used CAN Protocol to configure one of the sensors
• Potential of using Deep Learning to predict the tactile sensation given loads of tactile data
2025 & 2026 MATLAB for Machine Learning
• Two individual assignments
• Used Data Processing techniques to prepare the data
• Created Linear Regression, Feed Forward Neural Network, K-Nearest Neighbor, Logistic
Regression models.
• Achieved 62% in both assignments
• More details are covered in the cover letter and the presentation.
2025 Predictive Maintenance for Siemens/Festo Kit using IoT
• MEng group project of 7
• Gained hands-on experience working on PLCs, Conveyer Belt systems
• Used python to configure 4 Raspberry Pi’s for data collection
• Used OPC UA as a communication protocol to transfer data between the kit devices
• Engaged with various aspects of system engineering such as Gantt Charts, Risk Assessments
• Achieved 2nd Place in Siemens Connected Curriculum Competition
• Achieved 77% in this module
2023 Physical Systems modelling using MATLAB and Simulink
• 1st year project at the University of Sheffield
• Used MATLAB and Simulink to simulate the behavior of a quarter car suspension
• Modelled different car road profiles to inspect their effect on the car suspension system
• Modelled different thermals systems using Simulink
• Achieved 77% in the Car report submission and 72% in the Thermal system one.
